Privacy Policy

ColorDevKit

Last updated: April 10, 2026

Overview

ColorDevKit is a simple web tool that helps users convert RGB, RGBA, and HEX color values into developer-friendly formats. This Privacy Policy explains what information may be collected when you use the site and how that information may be used.

Information We Collect

The color values you type or paste into the tool are processed in your browser to generate conversion results. Those values are not intentionally stored in a database by this site.

  • Basic usage data may be collected by hosting or infrastructure providers.
  • Standard technical information such as browser type, device type, and pages visited may be logged automatically.
  • If analytics or advertising services are enabled in the future, they may collect additional usage and cookie-related data.

Cookies and Advertising

This site may use cookies or similar technologies for site functionality, analytics, or advertising. If Google AdSense or similar advertising services are added, those providers may use cookies to personalize ads, measure ad performance, and improve their services.

Third-Party Services

The site may rely on third-party services such as hosting, analytics, or advertising partners. Those services may process information according to their own privacy policies.

Data Security

Reasonable efforts are made to keep the site secure, but no method of transmission or storage on the internet is completely secure.

Children’s Privacy

This site is not intended to knowingly collect personal information from children.

Changes to This Policy

This Privacy Policy may be updated from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with a revised update date.

Contact

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact the site owner through the channel where this site is published.

Back to converter
